'''Amazing Tape'''
'''A Tezo's Art Supplies product'''
Description
Object 21 is the collective identity of spools of adhesive tape. Released in the early 1980s by [[Tezo's Art Supplies]], Amazing Tape can be found in any level. There is a correlation to the type of level and how likely it is for Object 21 to appear, with urban and indoor levels much more likely to have the item. Offices show a extreme likelihood to have Object 21, not matter the level's properties. Amazing Tape comes in one of two packaged forms. The first one is without any packaging at all. These collections only go up to 4 rolls of the product in any sort of arrangement. The second package is a clear plastic container. This plastic container has the Tezo's logo printed on top of it, and is kept shut by two plastic embeds. After pulling it open, wanderers will be able to access 8 uniquely designed spools of Amazing Tape. No matter how many is taken from the box, the next person who sees it, will see it full of tape. This visual oddity has been proven to be done 10 seconds after a piece of tape is removed from the box. When this happens. the tape will be the same as the one removed from it. Each level which Object 21 was discovered in has 10 different types. The design of the object does not need to match with the level around it either, so the printed design of the tape is varied and inconsistent. These 10 styles tend to be referred to as "Level ### Pack", with the numbers representing the level tied to the tape. There is no reward for collecting all the styles. The only other sightings of Object 21 have been within the level itself. In some cases, Amazing Tape acts similar to other strong tapes, with it appearing on drains or other cracks in walls as a sealant. Other times, the tape is used to add some visual difference to the level, with large and elaborate tape art being reported in places such as [[Level 4]]. Smaller ones have been claimed, but there has been no physical documentation saying otherwise.
Adhesive Properties
The extremely powerful adhesive properties of Amazing Tape makes it extremely durable to damaging, thus, its used in sealants as mentioned above. Yet, as a result of the anomalously adhesive abilities, using Amazing Tape is impossible. No one has shown the ability to use the tape, rendering it completely useless.
